deviations.what: Breadth-probe of the declarative-card paradigm: a sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card whose whole UI comes from a JSON manifest. The manifest is carried as an ABAP string and bound to the Card. The original binds several manifests from a named model; here one inline List-card manifest probes whether abap2UI5 can drive an integration card at all.

structural_diff.reason: breadth/capability probe — renders the control but is not a faithful 1:1 rebuild of the full sample
